allow: Bash(grep -oE "Kunne ikke hente garner: [^<]{0,300}|[0-9]+ garner med fibre" test.html)
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3210 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_-Force }")

Bash(powershell -Command "$pids = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3210 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach \($p in $pids\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; Write-Host ""Killed $p"" }")
Bash(powershell -Command "\(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3210 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique | Stop-Process -Force -PassThru | Select-Object Id,ProcessName")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3210 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host \(''Killed PID '' + $_OwningProcess\) }")
